name: Peacock Bros
message: Peacock Bros. Pty Ltd, Australian-owned and operated since 1888, has grown into one of the ANZ region’s largest providers of Data Management and Printing Solutions with branches in Melbourne, Sydney, Brisbane, Perth, Adelaide and Auckland. Manufacturers of high quality barcode and colour labels, we also work with the best technology brands to provide exceptional products, solutions and support for all your supply chain needs: - Barcode labels, Tags and Colour Labels - Thermal Printing, Ribbons & Applicator Systems - ID Card Services - Scanning & Mobile Computing - Wireless Infrastructure & Networking Solutions - Customized Software Solutions - Project Management & Engineering - Authorized Service & Support.
